visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with light brown, textured hair and a black long-sleeved shirt featuring a small white logo on the collar stands centered against a plain, off-white wall. He looks directly at the camera with a solemn, almost pained facial expression, his mouth tightly closed and eyes wide. He keeps his hands clasped in front of him. (2) The man begins to speak, his facial expressions becoming more animated; he blinks frequently and moves his head slightly to emphasize his points. He maintains his position in front of the white wall. (3) He performs a deep, formal bow, disappearing partially from the frame as he bends his torso forward, showing the top of his head and the back of his black shirt. (4) He stands back up and continues to address the camera, using hand gestures like pointing to himself and outward to emphasize specific words. (5) Screenshots of several digital news articles with headlines in Traditional Chinese and small profile photos are overlaid on the left and right sides of the screen, partially obscuring the white background while the man continues talking in the center. (6) He performs another deep bow toward the camera, then returns to a standing position, placing his right fist over his heart in a gesture of sincerity as he concludes his statement.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV：衰小嘎的莫名道歉聲明. (2) [Subtitle]: 本人. (3) [Subtitle]: 蔡緯嘉. (4) [Subtitle]: 網路綽號蔡阿嘎. (5) [Subtitle]: aka 嘉義山下智久. (6) [Subtitle]: 在這裏誠懇的向. (7) [Subtitle]: 社會大眾道歉. (8) [Subtitle]: 對不起. (9) [Subtitle]: 本人. (10) [Subtitle]: 不應該結交任何的朋友. (11) [Subtitle]: 也不應該. (12) [Subtitle]: 與身邊的家人. (13) [Subtitle]: 朋友、親戚、同事、夥伴或是任何人. (14) [Subtitle]: 有過多的. (15) [Subtitle]: 人與人的連結. (16) [Subtitle]: 否則. (17) [Subtitle]: 就會產生. (18) [Subtitle]: 微妙的變化. (19) [Subtitle]: 在這邊再次向社會大眾. (20) [Subtitle]: 道歉. (21) [Subtitle]: 就如同. (22) [Subtitle]: 只是. (23) [Subtitle]: 我的. (24) [Subtitle]: 員工. (25) [Subtitle]: 的老婆. (26) [Subtitle]: 的姐姐. (27) [Subtitle]: 的老公. (28) [Subtitle]: 他因為. (29) [Subtitle]: 犯罪上了新聞. (30) [Subtitle]: 也跟我有關. (31) [Subtitle]: 新聞標題. (32) [Subtitle]: 還是會寫我. (33) [Subtitle]: 對此. (34) [Subtitle]: 造成社會大眾. (35) [Subtitle]: 動盪不安. (36) [Subtitle]: 動搖國本. (37) [Subtitle]: 在這裏我本人向. (38) [Subtitle]: 全體國民. (39) [Subtitle]: 致上十二萬分的歉意，對不起. (40) [Subtitle]: 本人絕對深刻檢討. (41) [Subtitle]: 在此. (42) [Subtitle]: 也重申. (43) [Subtitle]: 本人. (44) [Subtitle]: 秉持. (45) [Subtitle]: 痛絕詐騙的決心. (46) [Subtitle]: 詐騙零容忍. (47) [Subtitle]: 希望所有的司法. (48) [Subtitle]: 檢調單位. (49) [Subtitle]: 要全面掃蕩非法集團.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator in the center of the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young man with dyed brown hair, wearing a black long-sleeved 'AVIREX' branded shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, solid off-white or light grey studio wall with no decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high clarity and a forced, mock-serious tone, enunciating each word carefully as he introduces himself by his legal name and various online monikers. The vocal energy is high, reflecting a performance of solemnity. (2) The voice continues, maintaining a rhythmic and almost theatrical cadence, expressing a deep apology to the public for social connections that lead to association with others' crimes. (3) The speaker lists family, friends, and colleagues with increasing intensity and dramatic pauses to emphasize the absurdity of the connection. (4) The speech culminates in a high-arousal statement about 'shaking the foundations of the nation,' delivered with significant vocal tension before a final, loud, and emphatic apology and call for legal action against fraud.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Contextual Apology -> Absurd Justification -> Moral Stance -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a satirical parody of a public apology video. The creator, a well-known influencer, uses a mock-serious tone and hyperbolic language to mock the phenomenon where public figures are forced to apologize for the actions of distant acquaintances or employees. By tracing an absurdly long chain of relationships to a criminal headline, he highlights the unfairness and absurdity of public scrutiny.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a highly stylized social media format (POV titles and large subtitles) to deliver a satirical message about internet culture and public accountability.
